tool_args.label: Debt Service Savings Explanation
tool_args.raw_text: Debt Service for the month of June was $228.5 million, which was $43.6 million or 16.0% favorable due to savings from interest prepayment, and refunding savings.

payload.claim_text: Debt Service for the month of June was $228.5 million, which was $43.6 million or 16.0% favorable due to savings from interest prepayment, and refunding savings.
payload.subject: MTA Debt Service

tool_args.label: NYCT Overtime overspend cause
tool_args.raw_text: YTD June overspend of $116M, 26% vs 2023 Adopted Budget, was due to increases of $106M at NYCT, $6M at both MNR and MTA HQ, $3M at the LIRR, and $2M at B&T, partially offset by a decrease of $7M at MTA Bus.

payload.claim_text: YTD June overspend of $116M, 26% vs 2023 Adopted Budget, was due to increases of $106M at NYCT, $6M at both MNR and MTA HQ, $3M at the LIRR, and $2M at B&T, partially offset by a decrease of $7M at MTA Bus.

tool_args.label: Preliminary and subject to review
tool_args.raw_text: Results are based on the preliminary close of the general ledger and are subject to review and adjustment. Please note that the current months' actuals do not include post-close adjustments, which will be captured in the YTD results.

payload.gap_text: Results are based on the preliminary close of the general ledger and are subject to review and adjustment. Please note that the current months' actuals do not include post-close adjustments, which will be captured in the YTD results.
payload.missing_information: Post-close adjustments not yet recorded; results subject to revision and annual audit review.

tool_args.label: Revised methodology for LIRR and MNR farebox ratios
tool_args.raw_text: In the agenda materials for the Meeting of the Metro-North and Long Island Committees, the calculations of the farebox operating and recovery ratios for the LIRR and MNR use a revised methodology to put the railroads on a more comparable basis. Those statistics, which are included in the respective financial and ridership reports of both Agencies, differ from the statistics presented in this table.

payload.claim_text: In the agenda materials for the Meeting of the Metro-North and Long Island Committees, the calculations of the farebox operating and recovery ratios for the LIRR and MNR use a revised methodology to put the railroads on a more comparable basis. Those statistics differ from the statistics presented in this table.
payload.subject: LIRR and MNR Farebox Ratios
